arts.ttl: Roma Goalie Updates on Much-Awaited Contract Extension
arts.sum: Mile Svilar has been waiting for Roma and his camp to come to terms on a renewal for a long time at this point. The agreement should finally be reached before the end of the season. He makes €900k and has a few suitors across Europe, especially in England. The post Roma Goalie Updates on Much-Awaited Contract Extension appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.sum: Claudio Ranieri addressed the media in a press conference on the eve of Roma's Europa League playoff match against Porto. The Italian coach discussed his expectations for the game, the qualities of his opponents, and his team's current challenges, including the role of Lorenzo Pellegrini and Roma's struggles away from home. arts.ttl: Europa League | Porto v Roma: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Europa League playoff round brings an enticing clash between Portuguese giants Porto and Serie A side Roma as they vie for a spot in the tournament’s last 16. The first leg takes place at the iconic Estadio do Dragao, where both teams will look to gain an early advantage in this high-stakes encounter. arts.ttl: Napoli to Try Again to Lure Pellegrini Away from Roma
arts.sum: Lorenzo Pellegrini eventually decided to stay at Roma in January after Napoli started courting him, but it’s not certain that will be the case long-term. He and the Giallorossi will soon have to sit down to discuss a renewal soon. The post Napoli to Try Again to Lure Pellegrini Away from Roma appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
